message:
Command `
# RCX failed for max_* but min_* is still running (2 OpenROAD processes at 21% CPU).
# Let's check the RCX directory to understand the state better.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== Step 75 RCX contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/75-openroad-rcx/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== RCX max log tail ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/75-openroad-rcx/max/rcx.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== RCX min log tail ==="
tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/75-openroad-rcx/min/rcx.log" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash
